title: Domestication, genomics and the future for banana.
author: Heslop-Harrison JS Schwarzacher T
content:
S-EPMC2759213 PMC2759213 Domestication, genomics and the future for banana.

Background

Cultivated bananas and plantains are giant herbaceous plants within the genus Musa. They are both sterile and parthenocarpic so the fruit develops without seed. The cultivated hybrids and species
